body.title: Engram tool: turn_id → retrieval-miss analysis report
body.result: TraceMissAnalyzer with 5 miss-flag heuristics + suggested engram shape. 20 tests including 897ad9c0 real-case fixture from 2026-04-23. Loaders injected for testability. 98569060.
body.description:
Build one-shot CC-side tool that takes a turn_id and produces a structured retrieval-miss report: input, intent, BG state, activated memories, grounding-gap analysis (what memory should have surfaced but didn't). Wraps turn_trace_recent + traces_recent + memory_get. Enables fast forensics on confabulated turns without manual MCP calls.

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/engram_tools/trace_miss_report.py, tests/test_trace_miss_report.py
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not, oop-first
**Scope boundary:** IN — tool consuming existing Igor trace/memory primitives, emits structured report. OUT — changes to tracing/memory internals, auto-remediation of grounding gaps.
**Test plan:** unit tests against canned turn_trace + traces_recent fixtures; verify report shape for known confabulation case (turn 897ad9c0, 2026-04-23 capability confab — 'I'm in the web channel, I can't execute code')
